creator: jmrueda@diatel.upm.es
text:
El 26/03/2010 1:40, Edwin Groothuis escribió:
> Maintainer of www/moodle,
>
> Please note that PR ports/145048 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>      http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/145048
>
>    

Approved. Thank you.
